title: Green Valley Estate Pvt. Ltd. v Defence Housing Authority
parties: Green Valley Estate Pvt. Ltd.; Defence Housing Authority
text: The plaintiff sought declaration and permanent injunction regarding cancellation of allotment. The defendant raised Order VII Rule 11 and maintainability objections, alleging alternate remedy and disputed facts. The Court held that the plaint disclosed a cause of action and interim protection was justified on prima facie case, balance of convenience and irreparable loss. The suit is decreed to the extent of declaration and injunction. The application is allowed.

title: Horizon Textiles v Federation of Pakistan
text: The constitutional petition under Article 199 challenged customs seizure and enhanced valuation. The department objected that alternate remedy was available and the petition was not maintainable. The Court found disputed valuation questions and statutory appeal remedy. The petition is dismissed on maintainability with observations that the petitioner may pursue alternate remedy before the competent forum.

title: State v Ahmed Ali
text: The criminal appeal arose from FIR and proceedings under the Code of Criminal Procedure. The accused sought bail after arrest and argued delay in trial. The prosecution opposed on the ground of seriousness of allegations. The appeal is partly allowed and the matter is remanded back to the trial court for fresh consideration of bail in accordance with law.
